scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1);} const fs=require('fs'); for(const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']){ try{ if(fs.existsSync(f)) fs.rmSync(f,{force:true}); }catch{} }"
scripts.build:vercel: pnpm run build:db && pnpm run build:api-zod && pnpm run build:api-server && pnpm run build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "!./artifacts/mockup-sandbox" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
